description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a hip roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features large floor-to-ceiling windows, a balcony above the main entrance, and a paved walkway leading to the door. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, contrasted by darker window frames and roof tiles. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a surrounding lawn and paved paths on multiple sides. The rear of the house has a smaller set of windows and a secondary entrance, while the sides are more solid with fewer openings. The overall appearance is contemporary, with an emphasis on symmetry and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a hip roof, large front windows, and a balcony, set on a rectangular lawn with paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, balcony, main entrance, and paved walkway.
description_view_1: Left side view with minimal windows and a solid wall, showing the depth of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view with smaller windows and a secondary entrance, less architectural detail.
description_view_3: Right side view with a mix of windows and a visible balcony, showing the house's side extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows on the front
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a balcony above, large glass panels, and a paved approach
